metadata.rulesText:
[Hang On!] When you play this character, choose one of the following. If you have another Toy character in play, choose both instead:
• You may return a character card with cost 2 or less from your discard to your hand.
• You may play a character with cost 2 or less for free.

metadata.rulesText:
Shift 3 Ink (You may pay 3 Ink to play this on top of one of your characters named Rapunzel or Flynn Rider.)
[Clever Swap] Whenever this character quests, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
[Fresh Start] During your turn, whenever you discard a character card, you may play that character from your discard. (You pay all costs.)

metadata.rulesText:
Shift 4 Ink (You may pay 4 Ink to play this on top of one of your characters named Carl Fredricksen or Russell.)
[Outdoor Skills] While this character is at a location, all characters at that location get +1 Lore and gain Evasive. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

products.name: Mickey Mouse & Minnie Mouse - Adventuring Duo

metadata.rulesText:
Duo Shift 0 Ink (You may pay 0 Ink to play this on top of two of your characters, one named Mickey Mouse and one named Minnie Mouse.)
[Thinking of You] If this character would be banished, put them into your inkwell facedown and exerted instead.
